description: Debug microcontrollers from Claude via OpenOCD: flash, breakpoints, memory and registers by name.
name: io.github.microhenrio/openocd-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Path to the OpenOCD executable. Optional: if unset, the server uses a bundled copy (when present) or 'openocd' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: OPENOCD_BIN

environmentVariables.description: Path to a per-project openocd-mcp.json (target_cfg/svd_file/elf_file). Optional: by default the server looks for openocd-mcp.json in the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: OPENOCD_MCP_CONFIG

title: OpenOCD Debugger
